title: 小米增長能力比大家所相像中要大好多

replies.msg:
受到某有錢佬啟發
小弟又試下開個post講一隻做左好耐功課既股票
小米

資料太多不能盡錄
先講結論
小米係咁多個手機品牌中最有潛力有高速增長的,沒有之一
首先小米既對手從來唔係APPLE
samsung都仲叫勉強係
但最大對手一定係華為,其次係VIVO OPPO

數據:
去counterpoint search Q4 2020
https://www.counterpointresearch.com/?s=Q4+2020

你會發現大部份post 都係xiaomi
1. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/online-channels-indonesia-smartphone-sales-q4-2020/
2. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/xiaomi-rises-third-biggest-player-latam-market-q4-2020/ [Xiaomi Rises as Third Biggest Player in LATAM Market in Q4 2020]
3. https://www.gizmochina.com/2021/02/17/xiaomi-leads-russia-online-smartphone-market-q4-2020/ [Xiaomi overhauls Samsung and Huawei in Russia Online Smartphone market during Q4 2020: Counterpoint]
Russia is an equally important market for Chinese brands. Last Quarter(Q3), Huawei led there with a 27.8% share in the Online Smartphone market. Counterpoint Research has come out with the next Quarter report and this time it is Xiaomi racing ahead of giants like Samsung and Huawei.

簡言之受到華為收皮既幫助,小米 vivo oppo係外國中國都搶緊生意來做
而家問題只係邊個會搶得羸
而小米係2019到2020間增長率係咁多個品牌最高
雖然到而家哩刻小米市佔率未係最高
但講增長潛力佢係最有potential

除左手機仲有一樣非常重要既factor
IOT
1. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/india-tws-shipments-q4-2020/
India’s TWS market posted 641% YoY growth in Q4 2020 with the shipments crossing the 10 million mark, according to the latest research from Counterpoint’s IoT service. This segment is one of the fastest growing in the smart wearables category, and now with the PLI scheme being extended to CIOT, we will witness higher growth in India’s TWS ecosystem.

2. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/china-smart-speaker-market-analysis-h1-2020/
China’s smart speaker market has experienced strong growth since 2018 and is now the 2nd largest market for smart speakers globally. China’s smart speaker market is quite consolidated and dominated by large internet/tech companies such as Baidu, Alibaba and Xiaomi.

3. https://finance.sina.com.cn/tech/2020-09-22/doc-iivhvpwy8174984.shtml
小米手环上半年全球出货量达 1340 万台，销量全球第一

講住咁多先
係咪想水人高位接貨？

但係長遠咁睇再加埋2021年終國國勢
40蚊絕對有可能係2021發生
有無巴絲係小米做緊
老闆靠財技搵錢，生意賺錢係其次

quote.msg: 怕唔怕小米會入實體清單 唔俾買高通晶片

replies.msg:
怕
哩個係第一大隱憂
但係華為都未死哂
小米亦暫時無事
最後就要睇拜登想搞好自己國家定想玩死中國為主要目的
另外華為係美國既影響力確實係大過小米
所以美國未有咁大需要搞死小米
小米反而係印度同歐州既市佔率較強大

https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/363700911
为什么OPPO和vivo手机比小米手机卖得多？
根据Streategy Analytics公布的数据显示，在今年上半年智能手机线上和线下的零售差距非常大，大家购买手机的方式主要通过线下，线下占比达到了总销量的72%，线上占比仅28%，包括2019年也是线下占比更多达到了76%，线上才24%。大家还是更加青睐于线下购买手机。

小米實體店已經去到5000間
反而VIVO OPPO實體店較少
哩個係疫症下對小米係一個損失
但長遠來講都係一個護城河
無論係apple定samsung始終實體店係有好多
因為賣既服務可以留到客人建立品牌效應

https://finance.sina.com.cn/tech/2020-11-13/doc-iiznctke1174238.shtml

据悉，起初小米面临着微软的Azure RTOS、三星的TizenRT、腾讯的TencentOS tiny、华为的LiteOS（被华为融入到鸿蒙OS中）、开源的Nuttx等多种选择，但最终选择了Nuttx。同时小米基于Nuttx打造了自己的小米Vela。 https://iot.mi.com/vela
据悉，小米Vela已支持小米IoT模组，可以在大多数智能家居产品上落地，也在推进在智能音箱、手环和运动手表上落地。小米还计划在明年(2021)专门为Nuttx举行开发者大会。

小米

資料太多不能盡錄
先講結論
小米係咁多個手機品牌中最有潛力有高速增長的,沒有之一
首先小米既對手從來唔係APPLE
samsung都仲叫勉強係
但最大對手一定係華為,其次係VIVO OPPO

數據:
去counterpoint search Q4 2020
https://www.counterpointresearch.com/?s=Q4+2020

你會發現大部份post 都係xiaomi
1. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/online-channels-indonesia-smartphone-sales-q4-2020/
2. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/xiaomi-rises-third-biggest-player-latam-market-q4-2020/ [Xiaomi Rises as Third Biggest Player in LATAM Market in Q4 2020]
3. https://www.gizmochina.com/2021/02/17/xiaomi-leads-russia-online-smartphone-market-q4-2020/ [Xiaomi overhauls Samsung and Huawei in Russia Online Smartphone market during Q4 2020: Counterpoint]
Russia is an equally important market for Chinese brands. Last Quarter(Q3), Huawei led there with a 27.8% share in the Online Smartphone market. Counterpoint Research has come out with the next Quarter report and this time it is Xiaomi racing ahead of giants like Samsung and Huawei.

簡言之受到華為收皮既幫助,小米 vivo oppo係外國中國都搶緊生意來做
而家問題只係邊個會搶得羸
而小米係2019到2020間增長率係咁多個品牌最高
雖然到而家哩刻小米市佔率未係最高
但講增長潛力佢係最有potential

除左手機仲有一樣非常重要既factor
IOT
1. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/india-tws-shipments-q4-2020/
India’s TWS market posted 641% YoY growth in Q4 2020 with the shipments crossing the 10 million mark, according to the latest research from Counterpoint’s IoT service. This segment is one of the fastest growing in the smart wearables category, and now with the PLI scheme being extended to CIOT, we will witness higher growth in India’s TWS ecosystem.

2. https://www.counterpointresearch.com/china-smart-speaker-market-analysis-h1-2020/
China’s smart speaker market has experienced strong growth since 2018 and is now the 2nd largest market for smart speakers globally. China’s smart speaker market is quite consolidated and dominated by large internet/tech companies such as Baidu, Alibaba and Xiaomi.

3. https://finance.sina.com.cn/tech/2020-09-22/doc-iivhvpwy8174984.shtml
小米手环上半年全球出货量达 1340 万台，销量全球第一
